title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with GPU acceleration.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; identical API surface to the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama models as LLMs and embeddings for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; talk to any local model, upload docs, RAG, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; sync/async APIs, streaming, pull/generate/embed support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama REST API with chat history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code completion and chat.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for production RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal reference implementation of retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack with GPU support, WebUI, Open-WebUI, and preloaded models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling, PVC, and optional WebUI sidecar.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module that exposes Ollama as injectable services with Swagger docs and RxJS streaming.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper for Ollama REST API with GenServer-based process management and LiveView chat example.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama with serde models and tokio streaming.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command for private or channel-wide conversations with local models.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app with REST API and admin UI for managing Ollama models, prompts, and chat sessions.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app that compares multiple Ollama models side-by-side with token-per-second metrics.

title: ollama-go
summary: Official Go client library for Ollama with generate, chat, pull, and embedding methods.
